heading: Wilsons Pocket vs Wilsonton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wilsons Pocket, Queensland and Wilsonton, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wilsons Pocket has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Wilsonton (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wilsons Pocket or Wilsonton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wilsons Pocket has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Wilsonton scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wilsons Pocket scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Wilsonton scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wilsons Pocket or Wilsonton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wilsons Pocket has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
